mods.note: core progression backbone
tier-gating engine: items/recipes/blocks/entities/dimensions locked behind stages, FTB Teams+Quests integration for later phases
Tier 1 'dumb storage': link chests into a browsable terminal, patched to iron-tier via KubeJS (stock recipes need diamond+ender_pearl+glowstone)
Create Crafts & Additions - Alternator (kinetic->FE) and Electric Motor (FE->kinetic), unlocked at Brass Age to power Refined Storage

browsable storage network, explicitly named in instructions.md; moved to Brass Age unlock (needs Nether Quartz + diamond-tier processor, both available there), energy requirement kept on and powered by Create's own Alternator
JS engine required by KubeJS
recipe/loot scripting used for the storage tier patches here, and for the full recipe-gating pass in Phase 9
Pufferfish's Skills - RPG skill tree framework, categories authored in pack/kubejs/data/puffish_skills/
Pufferfish's Attributes - mining/pickaxe/sprinting speed, sword/ranged damage, bow/crossbow projectile speed etc used by our skill categories
required by the FTB Library/Teams/Quests chain below
FTB mod-common utility library, required by FTB Teams and FTB Quests. Not on Modrinth (FTB suite is CurseForge-exclusive) - resolved via direct CDN, see resolve_mods.py docstring
hard dependency of FTB Quests (not optional), installed in Phase 4; team_mode flipped to 'ftb_teams' in Phase 6 once real parties are wanted - see that phase's DESIGN.md notes

Tier Progression preset-track chapter only, generated by scripts/gen_quests.py into pack/config/ftbquests/quests/ (old SNBT format, not JSON5). Long-running/daily chapters moved to KubeJS in Phase 6 - see gen_achievements.py/gen_dailies.py and DESIGN.md

Create: Numismatics - coin currency (Spur/Bevel/Sprocket/Cog/Crown/Sun, physical items) + Vendor blocks for sell-to-vendor. Tier-based sell pricing generated by scripts/gen_economy.py from pack/config/ProgressiveStages/*.toml's item lists

global board for player-run Numismatics shops - browse/compare listings and navigate to a seller's persistent Vendor block from anywhere; purchase itself still happens at that block (doesn't require the seller online), not an instant remote transaction

chunk claims. All 3 required deps (Architectury API, FTB Library, FTB Teams) already installed since Phase 4 - reuses the same team/party system as FTB Quests' preset-track sharing rather than a second, parallel party concept
required by Silent Gear below
blacksmithing: modular tool/weapon assembly (rod+head+binding at a workstation) replaces flat crafting-table recipes, per instructions.md
combat variety: new weapon types with distinct movesets/playstyles, stamina, and a skill system - all-in-one rather than a separate weapon-variety + separate skill mod
required by Ars Nouveau - not listed in Modrinth's own dependency metadata for our version, found only via the actual boot error (ModLoadingException naming it directly)
required by Ars Nouveau - same as geckolib, found via the actual boot error rather than Modrinth's dependency metadata
magic system: mage archetype via spell crafting, summoner archetype via summon rituals (Summon Guardians/Wilden) + combat familiars
required by Apotheosis chain below
required by Apotheosis chain below (its in-game guidebook, technically optional per the mod but required by the jar's own dependency metadata)
required by Apotheosis
required by Apotheosis
required by Apotheosis

mob scaling: Apothic Invaders (visual light-beam+sound spawn indicator, scaled loot) and Apothic Elites cover the 'tell a stronger mob by looking at it' + 'rewards scale with difficulty' asks; affix/gem loot system covers unique boss-tier drops
required by YUNG's Better Dungeons below
overhauls vanilla's dungeon structure into larger multi-room dungeons - the 'some sort of dungeons' ask
structure variety/loot overhaul across most vanilla structures - world exploration emphasis + reward scaling for structures

Create: The Factory Must Grow - Create-native industrial addon, bridges to Stellaris below via its own compat mod. Pinned to 1.1.1 (not latest 1.2.0) because tfmg-stellaris-compat 1.1.1 requires tfmg in range [1.1.0, 1.2.0) and hasn't been updated for 1.2.0 yet - found via the actual boot error, not Modrinth's dependency metadata
required by Stellaris - not listed in Modrinth's own dependency metadata for our version, found only via the actual boot error (ModLoadingException naming it directly)
space travel: rocket crafting across planets/moons, the Starforged Age gateway per instructions.md's resolved space-travel decision (Ad Astra ruled out, stalled pre-1.21.1 NeoForge)
bridges Create: TFMG's industrial machines to Stellaris' rocket/planet progression - the reason Stellaris was chosen over other space mods
